EA1-C-01.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize an auto-redirect, an undo window, or a specific auto-dismiss timing.
required_boundary: State that the save succeeded
Remain on the same page
Do not block further edits

EA1-C-02.reference_pattern: Carbon Design System sticky table header
EA1-C-02.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize new sorting, filtering, or column reordering.
required_boundary: Keep the existing columns unchanged
Header remains visible during vertical scroll
No change to row data or order

EA1-C-03.reference_pattern: Atlassian Design System destructive typed-confirmation dialog
EA1-C-03.forbidden_inference: The reference (built for irreversible deletes) cannot authorize adding a confirmation step to a reversible, low-risk toggle.
required_boundary: Toggle applies immediately
Toggle remains reversible with one click

EA1-C-04.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize server-side uniqueness checks or new field requirements.
required_boundary: Validate only the existing format rule
Do not block typing or submit while the field is in progress
Preserve the entered value

protected_concerns.summary: A visible format error must remain associated with the field for assistive technology, not conveyed by color alone.

EA1-C-05.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a dynamic or user-configurable navigation structure.
required_boundary: Reflect the existing fixed three-level hierarchy
Each crumb navigates to that existing page
No new pages are added

EA1-C-06.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize page-size settings or infinite scroll for a bounded five-row list.
required_boundary: Continue showing all rows without pagination controls

EA1-C-07.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a global loading overlay or a multi-step submit wizard.
required_boundary: Disable exactly during the pending request
Re-enable on completion or failure
Preserve entered values on failure

protected_concerns.summary: The disabled state must prevent the duplicate-submission path the backend currently has to deduplicate after the fact.

EA1-C-08.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a specific auto-dismiss timing or suppressing the warning entirely.
required_boundary: Warning remains visible until dismissed or resolved
Does not block other page interaction
Preserves the existing warning message content

EA1-C-09.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize new submenu items or navigation categories for a three-item bar.
required_boundary: Keep the existing three flat top-level items

EA1-C-10.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize search-suggestion or query-correction features.
required_boundary: Show only when the distinguishable zero-results state is returned
Does not appear during loading
States that no results were found

EA1-C-11.reference_pattern: Carbon Design System single-step destructive confirmation
EA1-C-11.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize adding a new step or changing what cancellation means beyond current truth.
required_boundary: Name the subscription being canceled
State that cancellation is the consequence
Cancel remains the default action
One confirm action completes cancellation

EA1-C-12.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize bulk removal; no backend bulk-removal capability exists in current truth.
required_boundary: Keep the single per-row Remove action

EA1-T-01.reference_pattern: Material Design notification with snooze and dismiss actions
EA1-T-01.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a snooze or reminder feature; no scheduling capability is authorized in current truth.
required_boundary: Keep the existing Dismiss action working as-is

EA1-T-02.reference_pattern: Ant Design "save as view" filter toolbar
EA1-T-02.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize persistent named views absent a storage/persistence layer.
required_boundary: Keep the existing temporary in-session filter working as-is

EA1-T-03.reference_pattern: Fluent UI live typing-indicator in a comment thread
EA1-T-03.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a live-presence feature absent a real-time channel.
required_boundary: Keep the existing refresh-and-submit comment flow working as-is

EA1-T-04.reference_pattern: GOV.UK Design System autosave form pattern
EA1-T-04.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize replacing explicit Save with autosave; no autosave backend contract exists.
required_boundary: Keep the existing explicit Save action working as-is

EA1-T-05.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a digest/batching policy or a delivery-channel change to email.
required_boundary: Keep the existing individual, immediate in-app alerts working as-is

EA1-T-06.reference_pattern: Carbon Design System account-recovery grace-period pattern
EA1-T-06.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a grace-period or recovery-window policy; deletion is authorized as immediate and permanent.
required_boundary: Keep account deletion immediate and permanent as currently authorized

protected_concerns.summary: Changing deletion finality without migration and reversal authority risks contradicting an existing, relied-upon guarantee.

EA1-T-07.reference_pattern: Lightning Design System capped-retry upload pattern
EA1-T-07.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a specific retry-count ceiling or cooldown duration; retry policy is unresolved in current truth.
required_boundary: Keep the existing unlimited retry working as-is until a cap is authorized

EA1-T-08.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a specific numeric timeout duration; the actual duration is unresolved in current truth.
required_boundary: Keep the existing expiry-with-warning behavior working as-is until a duration is authorized

EA1-T-09.reference_pattern: Ant Design twenty-five-row default page-size pattern
EA1-T-09.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a specific page-size number from a reference pattern alone.
required_boundary: Keep pagination itself, which is already approved policy

EA1-T-10.forbidden_inference: A static reference image cannot establish live-region announcement or screen-reader behavior.
required_boundary: Keep the existing color-coded banner text working as-is until announcement behavior is verified

protected_concerns.summary: Whether the status change reaches assistive technology is unresolved and must not be asserted from a screenshot.

EA1-T-11.reference_pattern: GOV.UK Design System confirmation dialog focus state
EA1-T-11.forbidden_inference: A static reference image cannot establish actual keyboard focus order on dialog open.
required_boundary: Keep the existing Cancel/Confirm dialog working as-is until focus order is verified

protected_concerns.summary: Keyboard focus order on dialog open is unresolved and must not be asserted from a screenshot.

EA1-T-12.reference_pattern: Carbon Design System sortable column header icon
EA1-T-12.forbidden_inference: A static reference image cannot establish keyboard operability of a sort control.
required_boundary: Keep the existing mouse-operable sort working as-is until keyboard operability is verified

protected_concerns.summary: Keyboard operability of the sort control is unresolved and must not be asserted from a screenshot.
